_meta.description: Data-driven guardrails and tiebreaker rules for editing operator routing. Each rule has a unique id, match conditions, and an enforcement action. Consumed by operatorPlanner (pre-filters) and operatorValidator (post-guards).

guardrails.description: In editor mode, a frozen/live selection takes precedence over structural resolvers for targeting the edit scope.

examples.expected: scope targets para_3 via selection, not structural_resolver

guardrails.description: Heading/bulk resolvers must not override an explicit selection unless the user says 'entire document', 'todo o documento', or equivalent whole-doc phrase.

blockMessage.en: You have an active selection. To apply this change to the entire document, please say 'entire document'.
blockMessage.pt: Você tem uma seleção ativa. Para aplicar ao documento inteiro, diga 'documento inteiro'.

examples.expected: blocked — selection active but user didn't say 'entire document'

examples.input: change all headings in the entire document to Arial

guardrails.description: Formatting intents (bold, italic, font, color, size, alignment) must never be routed to rewrite operators (REWRITE_PARAGRAPH, REWRITE_SECTION, REPLACE_SPAN). They must go to SET_RUN_STYLE / FORMAT_RANGE.

blockMessage.en: Formatting changes cannot be processed by a text rewrite operator.
blockMessage.pt: Alterações de formatação não podem ser processadas por um operador de reescrita.

examples.expected: blocked — formatting intent routed to rewrite

guardrails.description: Structural intents (insert, delete, merge, split, list operations, TOC) must never fall back to DOCX_REWRITE_PARAGRAPH or DOCX_REPLACE_SPAN.

blockMessage.en: Structural operations cannot fall back to paragraph rewrite.
blockMessage.pt: Operações estruturais não podem usar reescrita de parágrafo como fallback.

examples.expected: blocked — structural intent on rewrite fallback

guardrails.description: When multi-intent produces both a rewrite and a translate on the same target, require user confirmation before proceeding.

confirmMessage.en: You asked to both rewrite and translate the same content. Should I proceed with both?
confirmMessage.pt: Você pediu para reescrever e traduzir o mesmo conteúdo. Devo prosseguir com ambos?

examples.input: rewrite this paragraph and translate to English

guardrails.description: Destructive operations always require explicit user confirmation before execution.

confirmMessage.en: This is a destructive operation that cannot be undone. Are you sure?
confirmMessage.pt: Esta é uma operação destrutiva que não pode ser desfeita. Tem certeza?

guardrails.description: If the proposed edit would result in no change (changed=false), return NOOP with a specific reason instead of silently succeeding.

noopMessage.en: No changes were needed — the content already matches your request.
noopMessage.pt: Nenhuma alteração necessária — o conteúdo já corresponde à sua solicitação.

guardrails.description: Operator is only allowed if the document engine supports it. Chart insert requires sheets engine; DOCX structural ops require DOCX engine.

blockMessage.en: This operation is not supported by the current document engine.
blockMessage.pt: Esta operação não é suportada pelo mecanismo de documento atual.

examples.expected: blocked — chart creation requires sheets engine

tiebreakers.description: When both selection and structural resolver propose a target, prefer the explicit selection.
When intent is formatting, prefer operators in the formatting class over rewrite class.
Prefer domain-specific operators over generic ones (DOCX_SET_RUN_STYLE over generic EDIT_PARAGRAPH).
